name: longeva-advisor-mcp
description: Servidor MCP do Google Drive simplificado e focado em Claude Code para a Longeva Assessoria

scripts.package: npm run build && pkg dist/server.cjs --output bin/longeva-advisor-win.exe --targets node18-win-x64 && pkg dist/server.cjs --output bin/longeva-advisor-macos --targets node18-macos-x64 && pkg dist/installer.cjs --output bin/instalar-win.exe --targets node18-win-x64 && pkg dist/installer.cjs --output bin/instalar-macos --targets node18-macos-x64
